response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and a track record of shipping complex systems, he significantly underperforms against the core technical requirements. The role demands 8 years of C++ experience and deep cloud infrastructure expertise; Bogdan has only ~3 years of explicit C++ work (2014-2018) and has shifted primarily to TypeScript/Node.js in recent years. Additionally, while he has held senior and staff-level positions, there is no clear evidence of explicit technical leadership and mentoring experience expected for this role.
strengths: Strong software craftsmanship foundation with proven TDD, CI/CD, and shipping discipline across multiple products
16+ years of programming experience with demonstrated ability to architect complex systems (GISCollective, high-throughput Dunnhumby infrastructure)
Founder and maintainer of open-source projects showing ownership of large technical systems and ability to drive completion
concerns: Only ~3 years of explicit C++ experience versus the 8-year minimum requirement; recent career (2018+) dominated by TypeScript/Node.js/DLang rather than C++
Limited evidence of technical leadership or mentoring experience; career history shows individual contributor and founder roles rather than team leadership
No demonstrated focus on cloud architecture or compute platform expertise; experience is across full-stack and diverse domains rather than infrastructure-specialized

key_factors.factor: Cloud infrastructure and distributed systems focus
